description: Manages department templates including creation, versioning, deployment, and lifecycle operations for multi-agent department configurations.

events.name: template.created
events.description: Emitted when a new department template is created

events.name: template.updated
events.description: Emitted when a department template is updated

events.name: template.deleted
events.description: Emitted when a department template is deleted

events.name: template.versioned
events.description: Emitted when a new version of a template is created

events.name: template.deployed
events.description: Emitted when a template is deployed to an environment

events.name: template.deployment_failed
events.description: Emitted when a template deployment fails

events.name: template.undeployed
events.description: Emitted when a template deployment is removed

events.name: template.cloned
events.description: Emitted when a template is cloned

MODULE05_JWT_SECRET.description: Shared secret for HMAC-S256 JWT validation

MODULE05_MAX_PAGE_SIZE.description: Maximum page size for list operations
